name: development-workflow
description: Reusable development workflow skills for evidence-based handoff, PR continuation, review fixes, and skill catalogue safety.

interface.longDescription: Helps agents continue development work from checked repository, branch, PR, review and validation evidence instead of stale chat memory.
defaultPrompt: Use $development-handoff to continue this PR from evidence.
Use $development-handoff before fixing review comments in the same PR.
Use $development-handoff to prepare a concise handoff for the next agent.
